title: tnt knock-BACK
description: You can now cast TNT repel with swords using the knockback enchantment
body:
a feature removed as a bug in pre-1.17 -> https://bugs-legacy.mojang.com/browse/MC-225190 

CONDITIONS: You do need any type of Sword and Enchant it With Knockback (any level) and by, the Tnt is thrown in the direction the player's hit is facing

ENCHANTMENT LEVELS: Each enchantment level increases x2 the current distance of the launch , the default distance is 6 (i think) and each level multiply x2 that distance

PD:
The guy who reported it as a bug has had their house blown up 1292 times. ![:unnamused face: :and angry face:] ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/644e91761015482ceb88e9d17d8b75f4601dee4f.png)

A freind =) support MehvadJukaar (AKA Supplementaries Dev): https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries

HE IS THE BEST DEV...its an exageration srry xd
